gaps.title: Add @impact_ripple trait for barrier-collision VFX (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing examples/quantum-arena.refreshed.hs, the energy barrier scene needed a visual trait that renders deflection ripple waves on a surface when @collidable physics objects strike it. @force_field exists in the registry but only names the effect — no Trait*.ts implements a hit-ripple animation. Suggested API shape: @impact_ripple { pattern: 'ring'|'splash'|'shockwave', color: '#00ffff', intensity: 0.8, duration_ms: 400, radius: 1.2 } — attaches to any @collidable node and spawns a screen-space ripple mesh on collision events received from the physics engine.
